PROP-01b-partial3-inv-039.text: AuctionBidder leftover assetOut transferred to configured receiver, never stuck.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-039.assertion: forall AuctionBidder.bid(): post(assetOutBalance) > 0 AND receiver != 0 => transfer(receiver, balance)

locations.note: lines 83-91: after auction.bid, if assetOutBalance > 0 && receiver != 0 => safeTransfer(receiver, balance)
